posts.author: belfreel (Yury)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Monday community

I’m developer.
I love programming and automation.

I would like to make apps for the marketplace.
I read the documentation and watched the video.
But I still have a couple of questions.

I found on site: The apps monetization allows your monday app to accept payments from users directly through monday

Questions:

  1. Does Monday have fees for accepting payments?
  2. How Monday pays developers earned money?

Thanks for attention!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @belfreel and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

Regarding your questions, as of today, monday does not have any fees over the payments.

Regarding the details on how everything works and the process you need to follow for publishing an app on the marketplace, I invite you to write an email to shaulg@monday.com who will be able to assist you!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
